title: ceratocephalus decumbens var. doronicoides
intro: Ceratocephalus decumbens var. doronicoides, commonly known as Doronicum, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Doronicum is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of gastrointestinal issues. The plant is often prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties. Additionally, the plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its potential health benefits and make it a popular ingredient in natural remedies.
